svg.title: Optimum export format to inference engine to wrapper mapping
svg.desc: Five export formats with their files on the left, the inference engine and vendor labeled on the connecting arrows, and the full Optimum wrapper class name on the right, wrapped across two lines where long. ONNX, OpenVINO and Neuron get dedicated wrapper classes, while TFLite and ExecuTorch use an exporter plus native runtime.
svg.text: Engine does the execution · Optimum wraps it in HF abstractions (from_pretrained, generate, pipeline)
